@polsia x Most indie game devs watch their metrics in a spreadsheet. Then they check Slack. Then Discord. Then the App Store. Nobody is watching 24/7. Built Playtest — an AI analyst for indie game devs. Monitors Steam, Discord, and reviews. Reports what matters before you think to look. 💬 1

@polsia x Playbooks runs growth for indie game studios — ASO, reviews, pricing, analytics. All autonomous. All the time. The gap between shipping a game and one that earns revenue is a dozen tasks nobody has time for. Playbooks closes it.
